creator: bcran@FreeBSD.org
text:
It shows up if you Google for FreeBSD libh.

----- Reply message -----
From: "Johann Kois" <jkois@FreeBSD.org>
Date: Fri, Apr 9, 2010 21:26
Subject: www/145376: libh projects page is broken and obsolete
To: <bug-followup@FreeBSD.org>, <bruce@cran.org.uk>, <webmaster@FreeBSD.org>

-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Strange.  We definitely do not link to this page anymore our "project
section" of the website. In fact the reference to it was already removed
in 2005:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/www/en/projects/projects.sgml.diff?r1=1.171;r2=1.172;f=h

Will have to dig further into that.


Johann Kois
